title: cr_verify_carrier - arguments
description: Fetch a US carrier's live FMCSA profile by DOT or MC number, at full dashboard parity. Returns the complete carrier profile (operating status, authority history, fleet, insurance detail incl. BIPD/cargo/bond flags + expiry, safety rating, 24-month inspections and crashes, complaints, MCS-150, cargo/operation classifications, contact + addresses), fraud/identity signals - fraud_signals: the same 7-signal set the dashboard's fraud card shows (sanctions, industry fraud reports, operating authority, out-of-service, BIPD insurance, safety record, chameleon/reincarnation check), plus raw double_broker_signals hits and advisory_flags - a legacy risk_assessment (PROCEED/CAUTION/BLOCK), AND a canonical 0-100 trust_score with per-factor breakdown + breakdown_max + data_confidence (the same score the dashboard surfaces). trust_score is null when this carrier has never been looked up across any CR surface. EIN is deliberately excluded from the agent door. FMCSA result cached 24h; trust_score and the fraud/identity signals are read fresh on every call. Requires a DOT or MC number - if you only have a legal name, call cr_search_registry first to resolve the identifier. Not available to carrier-role accounts.

x-mcp.roleNote: Role-gated: carrier-role accounts cannot call carrier verification (prevents account-type arbitrage).

dot_number.description: The carrier's USDOT number. Provide this or mc_number.

mc_number.description: The carrier's MC number. Provide this or dot_number.
